bio: Azim Esmaili Khosrowabadi served as Deputy Commander of the [Basij Forces](/orgs/basij) under the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps). He was killed on 17 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave) targeting senior Iranian military leadership.

sources.title: Senior Basij Deputies Killed in Israeli Strikes
